name: Raise Dead
description: The Cleric points, speaks the word, and the dead rise — men, elves, and dwarves only. An 8th-level Cleric raises the four-days dead; each level beyond stretches the limit another four days. The weak of Constitution cannot be recalled at all, and all who return spend two game weeks recovering. For Anti-Clerics the spell reverses into The Finger of Death.
period_conventions: time-limit formula: 4 days + 4 per level above 8th
